title: Beach Bliss
description: Discover this stunning 5-bedroom, 5-bathroom retreat with amazing views, a chef's kitchen, and proximity to the beach, perfect for families or groups of up to 8 guests.
amenities: Enjoy a range of amenities including air conditioning, pool table, outdoor kitchen, BBQ grill, bicycles, and a dedicated workspace. Essentials like WiFi, TV, and laundry facilities are also provided.
nearbyPlaces: Indulge in fresh seafood, explore historical sites, and enjoy local coffee shops, all within a 5-30 minute drive. Beaches, shopping boutiques, and golf courses nearby!
